THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLETTA, STANLEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 515 JONES STREET, DEPT. 19, STAYED UNTIL JUN-03-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. ALL CLAIMS WVD. PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. NO ONE ELSE RIGHT TO POSSESSION. IF DEFT FAILS TO COMPLY PLTF TO HAVE AMD JUDGMENT FOR $600 BACK RENT PLUS $10- PER DAY FROM 4/16 THRU 6/3/97 PLUS COSTS OF $165-. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GALLETTA, STANLEY
